import { type PluginAccessOptions } from './plugin'; export interface SerializerOptions extends PluginAccessOptions { globalIdentifier: string; scopeId?: string; disabledFeatures?: number; onData: (result: string) => void; onError: (error: unknown) => void; onDone?: () => void; } export default class Serializer { private options; private alive; private flushed; private done; private pending; private cleanups; private refs; private plugins?; constructor(options: SerializerOptions); keys: Set<string>; write(key: string, value: unknown): void; ids: number; private getNextID; push(value: unknown): string; flush(): void; close(): void; } //# sourceMappingURL=Serializer.d.ts.map
